title: Techno Pairs
subtitle: A team-based challenge blending coding and problem-solving. Encouraging collaboration through dynamic technical tasks. Exploring innovation through engaging and competitive rounds.
description:
Title of the event: Techno Pairs 
 Objective: The objective of this event was to bring a platform where participants can team up with three other random participants and get into an exciting journey of problem solving, algorithms, and coding. Crossing every level would bring a new twist and challenge. This event was a technical treasure hunt where a storyline was created based on the theme ‘Global Innovation’ in accordance to BVEST's.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Team-based competition with randomly formed groups.
